zh.lifeSummary: 當John d'Eu Count of Eu於1118年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利艾時，他的父親Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I41歲，母親Margaret Sully18歲。他於1158年與Alice Albini在英國英格蘭素可海斯廷斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1170年6月26日在英國素可海斯廷斯享年52歲，埋葬在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利福卡爾蒙特。

nameMeanings.name: d'Eu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ravindra, Sohini, Vivek, Ajay, Alok, Anil, Annapurna, Daya, Ganga, Goutam, Harnek, Indra.

Indian (northern states): from Sanskrit deva ‘deity, lord’. This was a title used by ruling families in northern India. There is a Jat tribe called Deo. In northeastern India this name is spelled and pronounced Deb . Elsewhere, a common variant is Dev .
Italian: from a short form of the personal names Amadeo, Laudadeo, or Sperindeo, of which only the first now remains in use as a personal name.

variants.name: Deb
meanings: Indian (northeastern states): variant of   Deo  , found among Kayasthas.

variants.name: Dev
meanings: Indian: variant of   Deo  . In Maharashtra, Konkanastha Brahmins have a clan called Dev.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John d'Eu Count of Eu was born in 1118, in Eu, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, his father, Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I, was 41 and his mother, Margaret Sully, was 18. He married Alice Albini in 1158, in Hastings, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 26 June 1170, in Hastings, Sussex, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John d'Eu Count of Eu est né en 1118, à Eu, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Comte d’Eu Henry d'Eu I, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Margaret Sully, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Alice Albini en 1158, à Hastings, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 26 juin 1170, à Hastings, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France.

Er hat 1158 in Hastings, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Alice Albini geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 26. Juni 1170 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Hastings, Sussex, England und wurde in Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

Lui sposato Alice Albini nel 1158, nel Hastings, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: John d'Eu Count of Euが1118年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメエウで生まれた時，父Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu Iは41歳，母Margaret Sullyは18歳であった。1158年にイギリスイギリススセックスハスティングズでAlice Albiniと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1170年6月26日にイギリススセックスハスティングズで52歳で死去し，フランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメフォウカーモントにて埋葬された。

ko.Fontevrault, Maine-Et-Loire, Pays De La: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이
ko.lifeSummary: John d'Eu Count of Eu(이)가 1118년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 우에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Sully(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1158년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 하스틴그스에서 Alice Albini(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1170년 6월 26일 영국 수세스 하스틴그스에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 포우카몽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John d'Eu Count of Eu nasceu em 1118, em Eu, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Sully, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Albini em 1158, em Hastings, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 26 de junho de 1170, em Hastings, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França.

ru.Fontevrault, Maine-Et-Loire, Pays De La: фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John d'Eu Count of Eu родился в 1118 г. в местности эу, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Sully, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Albini в 1158 г. в местности хастингс, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 26 июня 1170 г. в местности хастингс, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности фоукармонт, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John d'Eu Count of Eu nació en 1118, en Eu, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Margaret Sully, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Alice Albini en 1158, en Hastings, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 26 de junio de 1170, en Hastings, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia.
